name: Strategic Minds Enterprise MCP
description: Full autonomous enterprise MCP kernel for Strategic Minds AI operations across all accounts, providers, and platforms.

servers.name: AUTO_BUILDER MCP
servers.description: Master kernel — all other MCP servers registered here

servers.name: Strategic Minds Universal Ops MCP
servers.description: Full read/write/execute connector for all connected accounts and APIs

servers.name: XPS Website Factory MCP
servers.description: XPS-specific business workflows: intake, build, QA, deploy, handoff

servers.name: MCP Gateway Router
servers.description: Unified entry point for GPT Agent Builder, Base44, Vercel agents, crons, webhooks

factory_projects.description: Canonical XPS project record linking client, queue, gates, payments, files, handoff, receipts

factory_whatsapp_messages.description: Inbound/outbound WhatsApp messages with parsed commands, gate_id, provider receipt, error state

factory_image_assets.description: All project images — source, generated, Drive-hosted. Includes license, permission, alt_text, crop_instructions, approval_status, usage_restrictions

factory_receipts.description: XPS-scoped receipt ledger. factory_receipts_full VIEW unions XPS-tagged mcp_receipts + factory_receipts for complete audit trail
factory_receipts.view_description: UNION of mcp_receipts (xps-tagged) + factory_receipts — use for complete XPS receipt audit
